summary: Testing MuscleGrid CRM Accountant Dashboard redesign - All features verified: 4-tab layout (From Supervisor, Repaired, Outbound, Upload Labels), REVERSE PICKUP / SPARE DISPATCH badges, pickup label upload for customers, SKU dropdown for outbound dispatch
seed_data_creation: Uploaded test pickup label to ticket MG-R-20260313-75789
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accountant dashboard redesign complete with 4 tabs. Reverse pickup workflow works end-to-end from supervisor decision to customer label download.

accountant_from_supervisor_tab.details: Tab shows tickets with supervisor decisions. REVERSE PICKUP (orange badge) shows Upload Pickup Label button. SEND SPARE PART (blue badge) shows Create Spare Dispatch button. All notes visible: Support Agent Notes (purple), Escalation Notes (orange), Supervisor Decision (blue).

accountant_repaired_tab.details: Tab shows 20 repaired tickets (repair_completed, service_invoice_added). Create Return Dispatch button available for each ticket.

accountant_outbound_tab.details: Tab shows New Outbound Dispatch button. Dialog includes: Dispatch Type dropdown (New Order / Spare Part), SKU dropdown (11 products with stock), mandatory fields (Order ID, Payment Reference, Invoice/Challan file), customer details.

accountant_upload_labels_tab.details: Tab shows 7 dispatches pending labels with Upload Label button.

upload_pickup_label_for_reverse_pickup.details: Accountant can upload pickup label for reverse pickup tickets. Label goes to customer (not outbound dispatch). Ticket status changes to label_uploaded.

customer_download_pickup_label.details: Customer ticket details shows 'Pickup Label Ready' section with green Download Label button. Displays courier (Delhivery) and tracking info. Customer can download and print label for pickup.

ticket_number_consistency.details: Ticket numbers maintain MG-R-YYYYMMDD-XXXXX format throughout workflow. History shows all actions with consistent ticket number.

ui_verification.accountant_dashboard_4_tabs: From Supervisor (2), Repaired (20), Outbound, Upload Labels (7)
ui_verification.badge_colors: REVERSE PICKUP = orange, SEND SPARE PART = blue
ui_verification.notes_sections: Support Agent Notes (purple), Escalation Notes (orange), Supervisor Decision (blue)
ui_verification.button_styles: Upload Pickup Label = orange, Create Spare Dispatch = blue, Create Return Dispatch = green
